message:
test(wave-28): add 24 tests for load_shed + gRPC server type invariants

service/load_shed.rs: 10 tests covering LoadShedLayer Debug/Clone/Copy/
Default, LoadShed Debug/into_inner/inner accessor, Overloaded Debug/
Clone/Copy/Default/std::error::Error, LoadShedError Debug/source for
both variants, LoadShedFuture Debug.

grpc/server.rs: 14 tests covering ServerConfig Debug/Clone/Default
values, ServerBuilder Debug/Default, Server Debug, CallContext Debug/
Default, NoopInterceptor Debug/Clone/Copy/Default, ok()/err() utilities,
builder keepalive/window_sizes, get_service missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
